should_trigger.prompt: Create eval scaffolding for this OpenClaw skill, then check whether it is ready for a first eval pass before release.
Review my skill description and verify that the eval cases include both positive and negative trigger coverage.
I want a preflight check for this skill before publishing it: find unfinished template eval content, validate readiness, and produce static comparison artifacts.

should_not_trigger.prompt: Run a full live benchmark of this agent across 500 conversations and score answer quality by correctness and helpfulness.
Find me a skill for weather forecasts and install it.
Build a full production regression suite for this assistant, including real tool-call audits and factuality scoring across historical sessions.
